name: Suffolk Buns (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F or Mark 6.
2. Mix together the flour, ground rice, and baking powder in a bowl.
3. Rub in the butter until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
4. Stir in the sugar and caraway seeds.
5. Add the beaten eggs and sufficient milk to create a smooth, firm paste.
6. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and roll out to 1 inch thickness.
7. Cut into 2-inch rounds and place on a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes until golden brown.
If desired, currants can be substituted for the caraway seeds, though caraway seeds are a more traditional ingredient.
